if:interfaces.if:interface:
<#if network_user\-interface?has_content && (network_user\-outer\-vlan\-id?has_content || (network_user\-is\-untagged?has_content && network_user\-is\-untagged == true) || (network_user\-is\-match\-all?has_content && (network_user\-is\-match\-all == true)))> <#if network_user\-is\-untagged?has_content && network_user\-is\-untagged == true> VSI-${network_user\-interface}/untagged <#elseif network_user\-is\-match\-all?has_content && network_user\-is\-match\-all == true> VSI-${network_user\-interface}/any <#elseif network_user\-outer\-vlan\-id?has_content && network\-inner\-vlan\-id?has_content> VSI-${network_user\-interface}/${network_user\-outer\-vlan\-id}/${network\-inner\-vlan\-id} <#else> VSI-${network_user\-interface}/${network_user\-outer\-vlan\-id} </#if> bbfift:vlan-sub-interface <#else> <#if detailed\-output == false> <#if network_user\-interface?has_content>
${network_user\-interface}
<#else> bbfift:vlan-sub-interface
</#if> <#else>
bbfift:vlan-sub-interface
</#if> </#if>
